meaning: n.地球,陆地,泥土,洞穴,地球上的人类,尘世,[电]接地vt.埋入土中,把...赶入洞内,把...接地vi.躲入洞内
examples: The earth revolves on its axis.
The earth moves round the sun.
The Earth orbits in an ellipse.
The United States, the wealthiest nation on earth, presents the flip side of this paradox.
Because it's made from corn, it is both inexpensive and easy on the earth to produce.
